## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
<!-- What makes this documentation complete? -->

- [ ] Clear and concise
- [ ] Includes code examples
- [ ] Includes screenshots/diagrams
- [ ] Tested by following the documentation
- [ ] Reviewed by target audience
- [ ] Links to related documentation
- [ ] Includes troubleshooting section

## 📊 Priority

- [ ] 🔴 Critical - Blocks users/developers
- [ ] 🟠 High - Frequently needed
- [ ] 🟡 Medium - Occasionally needed
- [ ] 🟢 Low - Nice to have
